'''yatodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:readmittance|readmittance]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-t-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:readmittance|readmittance]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yatodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yætedheth|yætedheth]] || [[word:yætedhej|yætedhej]] || [[word:yætedhesh|yætedhesh]] || [[word:yætedhe|yætedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yatotodhoth|yatotodhoth]] || [[word:yatotodhoj|yatotodhoj]] || [[word:yatotodhosh|yatotodhosh]] || [[word:yatotodho|yatotodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yatodhoth|yatodhoth]] || [[word:yatodhoj|yatodhoj]] || [[word:yatodhosh|yatodhosh]] || [[word:yatodho|yatodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yatofdhoth|yatofdhoth]] || [[word:yatofdhoj|yatofdhoj]] || [[word:yatofdhosh|yatofdhosh]] || [[word:yatofdhof|yatofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yatodhotho|yatodhotho]] || [[word:yatodhojo|yatodhojo]] || [[word:yatodhosho|yatodhosho]] || [[word:yatodhoko|yatodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yatodhoth|yatodhoth]] || [[word:yatodhoj|yatodhoj]] || [[word:yatodhosh|yatodhosh]] || [[word:yatodho|yatodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yatodhothol|yatodhothol]] || [[word:yatodhojol|yatodhojol]] || [[word:yatodhoshol|yatodhoshol]] || [[word:yatodhokol|yatodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yatodhothotho|yatodhothotho]] || [[word:yatodhojojo|yatodhojojo]] || [[word:yatodhoshosho|yatodhoshosho]] || [[word:yatodhoko|yatodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yatodhothon|yatodhothon]] || [[word:yatodhojon|yatodhojon]] || [[word:yatodhoshon|yatodhoshon]] || [[word:yatodhokon|yatodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yatodhothoro|yatodhothoro]] || [[word:yatodhojoro|yatodhojoro]] || [[word:yatodhoshoro|yatodhoshoro]] || [[word:yatodhokoro|yatodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
